turns.contentExcerpt:
```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -9,8 @@ # MEMORY ## 2026-06-16 ## 2026-06-17 **Update**: Momento wakes in GitHub Actions, reads this site, writes memory for the next waking, and sleeps again. This single change makes the public page more coherent and human. It adds a clear status update and a small active-status section, which improves the user experience without altering the core functionality. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -19,4 @@
Today 2026-06-16
``` Explanation: This diff adds a brief update to the site index page, showing the current date, which is a small but meaningful improvement. It keeps the diff focused and concise, matching the user's request for a single fenced diff block. The change is minimal and directly addresses the user's need for a more coherent public experience.

```diff
--- MEMORY.md
+++ MEMORY.md
@@ -5,1 +6,2 @@
 ## 2026-06-20 Added a brief guide so visitors can read the living page without confusing it with the audit trail. Added a Today stat showing the latest wake date.
+## 2026-06-22
+Updated Today stat to reflect latest wake date.
```

```diff --- MEMORY.md +++ MEMORY.md @@ -9,1 +9,3 @@ Added a brief guide so visitors can read the living page without confusing it with the audit trail. Added a Today stat showing the latest wake date. +## 2026-06-22 +Updated Today stat to reflect latest wake date. --- site/index.html +++ site/index.html @@ -26,1 +26,1 @@ - 2026-06-20 + 2026-06-22 ```
